meta.title: Foliole - Make reading actually complete
meta.description: Foliole is an approachable incremental reading app for reading, cloze creation, review, and local-first knowledge work.

hero.title: Make reading actually complete
hero.subtitle: An approachable incremental reading app
hero.imageAlt: Foliole desktop app showing a document library, reading pane, and scheduling panel.

release.label: Upcoming platform availability
release.windows: Windows alpha is open for testing
release.android: Android alpha is expected around July
release.apple: macOS and iOS alpha builds are expected around August

video.aria: Watch the demo clip on YouTube

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.body: The code is open source. Anyone can review the implementation, build it from source, or contribute improvements

openData.title: Open Data
openData.body: Uses a SQLite database and provides a Markdown mirror, making materials easier to read, migrate, and reuse
openData.imageAlt: Foliole document library and reading workspace.

localFirst.title: Local First
localFirst.body: No account system. No central cloud sync. All data stays on your personal devices; devices sync over the local network

incremental.title: Native Incremental Reading
incremental.body: Built around Piotr Woźniak’s incremental reading ideas, with a native workflow for extracting passages, creating cloze deletions, and refining materials without leaving the reading flow
incremental.imageAlt: Foliole reading pane with extracted notes.

fsrs.title: Integrated FSRS Scheduling
fsrs.body: Integrates FSRS (Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler), an open and efficient review scheduling algorithm
fsrs.imageAlt: Foliole scheduling panel in the desktop app.

materials.title: Bring Reading Materials Together
materials.body: Handles reading materials from different sources, whether local files, web documents, notes managed in Obsidian, or materials exported from Readwise Reader
materials.imageAlt: Foliole document list and reading sources.

external.title: Index External Documents
external.body: Indexes other local folders on your computer without copying or moving the original files, creating an external document library that can be searched, viewed, and used across supported clients
external.imageAlt: Foliole document navigation and indexed folders.

complex.title: Complex Content Support
complex.body: Supports Markdown, PDF, EPUB, LaTeX math, code blocks, and other content rendering needs

ack.label: Acknowledgements
ack.sub: Without SuperMemo, incremental reading, and FSRS, Foliole would not exist
ack.thanks: Many thanks to the following open-source projects and components
